title: B1U3 Family matters Project
content: This slide introduces the project focused on planning an itinerary for a family day out. It is part of a family matters project.
key_claims: Planning an itinerary for a family day out.

title: Lead-in
content: The slide presents the acronym 'Family' as 'Father and mother I love you'. It includes an image of a family representation.
key_claims: Family means love for father and mother.

title: Lead-in
content: This slide asks what the first word is that comes to mind concerning family. It features the word 'Family' in a handwritten style.

title: How much do you know about your family?
content: The slide explores family through starting out, vocabulary, and understanding ideas sections. It discusses cultural differences, physical changes, and viewpoints.
key_claims: Changes of family members' physical appearances

title: Draw the mind map
content: This slide visualizes respect, knowledge, and acceptance concerning family culture, physical changes, and points of view. It connects these aspects to family members.

title: How do you deal with your family relationship?
content: The slide addresses conflict resolution, daily matters, and controversial issues within family relationships. It suggests compromise, apologizing, and encouragement.
key_claims: Controversial issues need encouragement and support.
